title: Termite Treatment in Kew Gardens, Queens | $800 – $4,000
metaDescription: Professional termite treatment in Kew Gardens, Queens. Protect your home from costly damage. Licensed experts, free inspections. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Kew Gardens homeowners face unique termite challenges due to the neighborhood's abundance of historic Tudor and Colonial-style homes with wooden structures. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive termite treatment services throughout Kew Gardens, from the tree-lined streets near Forest Park to the elegant residences along Lefferts Boulevard. Our licensed technicians use advanced detection methods and proven treatments to eliminate termite colonies and protect your valuable property investment.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Kew Gardens for over 15 years, understanding the specific termite pressures affecting Queens homes, particularly the older construction prevalent in this historic neighborhood. Our certified specialists offer free termite inspections, customized treatment plans, and long-term protection warranties that give Kew Gardens homeowners complete peace of mind.
localContext: Kew Gardens' charming architecture, including many pre-war apartment buildings near Queens Boulevard and stately single-family homes surrounding Maple Grove Cemetery, requires specialized termite protection due to extensive wood framing and vintage construction methods. The neighborhood's proximity to Forest Park and mature tree canopy creates ideal conditions for termite activity, making regular inspections essential for property preservation.

faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Kew Gardens?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Kew Gardens typically ranges from $800 to $4,000, depending on the size of your property, extent of infestation, and treatment method required. Smaller apartments or condos generally cost $800-$1,500, while larger single-family homes may range from $2,000-$4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: What types of termites are common in Kew Gardens, Queens?
faqs.answer: Kew Gardens primarily deals with subterranean termites, which enter homes through soil contact and create mud tubes along foundations. These are the most destructive termite species in New York and are particularly attracted to the older wooden structures common in Kew Gardens. Our treatment methods target both active colonies and prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Kew Gardens homes?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Kew Gardens are completed in 4-8 hours depending on your property size and treatment method. Liquid barrier treatments for single-family homes typically take a full day, while baiting systems can be installed in 2-4 hours. Follow-up monitoring visits are scheduled at 30, 60, and 90 days to ensure complete colony elimination.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite inspections before treatment in Kew Gardens?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide complimentary termite inspections for all Kew Gardens properties. Our certified inspectors examine your foundation, basement, crawl spaces, and wooden structures using moisture meters and infrared technology to detect hidden infestations. You'll receive a detailed report with treatment recommendations and a transparent price quote before any work begins.
